alerts.ruleName: MCP Server Spawned by Non-Agent Parent
alerts.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server process was spawned by a parent process that is not a recognised AI agent host.  Rogue MCP servers can be used to execute arbitrary commands, read files, or exfiltrate data while bypassing normal agent controls.

alerts.ruleName: MCP Server Spawned by Non-Agent Parent
alerts.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server process was spawned by a parent process that is not a recognised AI agent host.  Rogue MCP servers can be used to execute arbitrary commands, read files, or exfiltrate data while bypassing normal agent controls.
